prompt: Create a cheerful, kawaii-style wide selfie photo of four young female friends celebrating around a birthday cake indoors. The camera is held close at arm’s length from the right side, creating a playful group selfie angle with everyone leaning tightly together toward the lens. Use a bright cozy bedroom or party-room background with soft daylight, white walls, pastel bedding, and small shelf decor. Place a frosted birthday cake in the lower foreground, slightly out of focus, topped with exactly 12 colorful lit birthday candles in pink, yellow, blue, green, and striped patterns. The people wear soft pastel casual sweaters and tops in cream, pink, white, and pale blue, with long dark or brown hair; make the faces anonymized by smooth soft rectangular blur blocks while keeping hair, clothing, hands, and poses visible. The left person reaches one hand toward the camera in a playful open-palm gesture, and the right person’s pale blue sleeve fills the near-right edge like they are taking the selfie. Add hand-drawn crayon doodles over the photo in a cute energetic style: a huge pink uppercase headline reading HAPPY DAY across the top; exactly 10 heart doodles including pink and white hearts around the group; exactly 3 flower doodles, one large pink flower at top left, one small pink flower near bottom left, and one small yellow star-flower near the center; exactly 1 yellow crown doodle above the second person’s head; exactly 3 star doodles; exactly 5 green leafy sprig or curved accent doodles; and exactly 5 small pink motion marks or exclamation squiggles near the headline and right side. Use a clean bright aesthetic with high-key lighting, pastel pink and mint marker colors, whimsical birthday energy, shallow depth of field, and a polished social-media photo look. Avoid extra people, avoid realistic printed text besides the headline, and do not add watermarks.
